findings.replacement: import PIPELINE_STAGES from @deskwork/core/pipelines (canonical stage list) — Hardcoded stage name array detected. Per DESKWORK-STATE-MACHINE.md Commandment I, the eight stages (Ideas / Planned / Outlining / Drafting / Final / Published / Blocked / Cancelled) are the canonical set. Per the graphical-entries design (docs/superpowers/specs/ 2026-05-16-graphical-entries-design.md), this set will generalize into per-lane pipeline templates — hardcoded stage lists block that migration. Replace with a read from the lane's PipelineTemplate (`packages/core/src/pipelines/<id>.json` shipped defaults, with operator overrides at `<projectRoot>/.deskwork/pipelines/`). The override resolver in `packages/core/src/overrides.ts` picks the project's value when present and falls back to the plugin default.
